name: Wakou Shokuhin Co., Ltd.
summary: Wakou Shokuhin Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells soups and natural extracts in Japan and internationally. The company offers Ramen soups; and acts as an OEM manufacturer of various seasonings, primarily of Ramen soup. It sells its products through food manufacturers, hotels, restaurants, supermarkets, convenience stores, etc. The company was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Otaru, Japan.
